100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On February 28, 1926, the British Empire faced mounting tensions as discussions intensified over the future of the Irish Free State, with debates on its autonomy stirring political unrest. In the United States, the Senate's investigation into the Teapot Dome scandal continued, casting a shadow over the Harding administration. Meanwhile, in Germany, the situation remained precarious as inflation raged, affecting daily life and the economy.
